title: HOUSING AUTHORITY - 211info
text: NORTH BEND CITY COOS-CURRY HOUSING AUTHORITIES HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residents of the community with information about and access to affordable housing. Section 8 Housing Choice Voucher Program is tenant based assistance, meaning assistance follows the tenant as long as they remain eligible for the program. The Housing Authority is not the landlord but assists with rent payments to the landlords. Public Housing units are owned and managed by the Housing Authority. This program provides unit-based assistance, meaning if a family moves out of the unit, the assistance remains with the unit. One small pet is allowed with prior approval before moving into a unit. 1700 Monroe Street North Bend, OR 97459 Eligibility: Must meet income guidelines Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-4:30pm Email (541) 756-4111 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 756-4111 FAX (541) 756-1987 Toll-free (877) 897-9349 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Applications available online. FEES: None charged by the Housing Authority to apply or receive rental assistance. Tenant may be responsible for a portion of rent if deemed eligible to receive rental assistance. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Coos and Curry Counties Services: Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Public Housing Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
